facebook.caption:
POV: you booked Khem Beach and had no idea it would look like this.

New World Phu Quoc Resort sits right on Khem Beach, one of the clearest stretches of water on the island. 4.7 stars across 5,278 reviews. That number holds up.

The kind of place you walk into and immediately feel like you under-budgeted. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into New World Phu Quoc Resort on Khem Beach. 4.7 stars. 5,278 people rated this. The water color alone justifies the scroll-stop. Tag your travel buddy.
